creator: chromium@hybridsource.org
text:
Excellent work, I've updated these ports with licensing info and a 
couple small tweaks.  There was a bugfix for e_dbus yesterday that I 
pulled in from their repo.  I have the alsa-lib port installed so I had 
to modify a file in the mixer module of the enlightment port for it to 
compile.  I haven't checked all your changes to bsd.efl.mk, but the 
changes I looked at seemed consistent with the porting work I had 
started doing before stas pointed me at your patches.  I'm now running 
this E17 release and it works great. :) My updated patches can be found 
here:

http://chromium.hybridsource.org/e17-2010-06-27.tbz
